isolation.notes: Read-only site with hardcoded data, no shared mutable state

steps.observed: Homepage loaded successfully

steps.expected: Horizontal row of press logos with quotes
steps.observed: Section displays 4 press logos (Los Angeles Times, Bon Appétit, Well+Good, Essence) with associated editorial quotes below each

steps.expected: Cards in horizontal carousel with images and descriptions
steps.observed: Section shows 'Our Pillars of Nourishment' heading with 5 pillar cards: Ancestral Wisdom, Nutrient Density, Eat the Rainbow, Functional Ingredients, Intentional Preparation. Each has image, title, description, and Read More link
Both 'Previous slide' and 'Next slide' buttons found

steps.expected: Carousel scrolls to show more content
steps.observed: Carousel scroll triggered successfully (scrollWidth: 1172 > clientWidth: 1152)

steps.expected: Customer testimonial cards in horizontal scrollable carousel
steps.observed: Section displays 'Client Reviews' heading with 3 testimonial cards. Each has 5-star rating, review text in quotes, and customer name (Jasmine R., Marcus T., Alicia M.)
Scrollable container confirmed (scrollWidth: 1172 > clientWidth: 1152) with 2 navigation buttons (Previous/Next slide)

steps.expected: Email input and Sign Up button visible
steps.observed: Newsletter section displays 'STAY CONNECTED' heading, email input field, and 'SIGN UP' button

steps.action: Click SIGN UP with empty email field
steps.observed: Error message 'Please enter a valid email address' displayed in red below input, input border turned red

steps.action: Fill email with 'test@example.com' and click SIGN UP
steps.observed: Success message 'Thank you for signing up! We'll be in touch soon.' displayed, form replaced by confirmation text

steps.action: Navigate to homepage at 1280px desktop width
steps.observed: Homepage renders with horizontal hero layout, 4-column editorial grid, and horizontal carousels at 1280px viewport

steps.expected: flex-col on mobile, flex-row on desktop
steps.observed: Hero uses 'flex flex-col lg:flex-row'. Mobile image has 'lg:hidden', desktop image has 'hidden lg:block'. Text area uses 'w-full lg:w-1/2'
EditorialCards uses 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4' — collapses to single column on mobile
Carousel component uses breakpoints: mobile=1.3 slides, 480px=2.2 slides, 768px=3 slides, 1024px=4 slides — touch-scrollable by default
BrandFeature uses 'flex flex-col lg:flex-row' — stacks vertically on mobile
Navigated to http://localhost:3000/meal-plans — page loaded successfully
Navigated to http://localhost:3000/shop — page loaded successfully
Navigated to http://localhost:3000/about — page loaded successfully
Navigated to http://localhost:3000/blog/healing-power-of-soul-food — page loaded successfully

steps.action: Verify all editorial cards have correct hrefs
steps.expected: All 4 cards link to blog articles
steps.observed: All 4 editorial cards link to /blog/healing-power-of-soul-food, /blog/5-adaptogens-you-should-know, /blog/meal-prep-sunday-ritual, /blog/rainbow-bowl-recipe

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. All homepage interactive elements (press logos, philosophy pillars carousel, testimonials carousel, newsletter form validation/submission, responsive CSS classes, and CTA navigation) are working correctly.
